case_title: MINOR, ROBERT VS ANNUZZI'S CONCRETE SERVICE INC. et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI'S CONCRETE SERVICE INC.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI'S CONCRETE SERVICE INC. AVILA, ARNULFO NON-APPEARANCE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY MINOR, ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT ANNUZZI'S CONCRETE SERVICE INC. AVILA, ARNULFO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-09-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION APR-09-2002, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAY-10-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 POSSIBLE SETTLEMENT. IF THERE ARE NO PROBLEMS WITH THE SETTLEMENT CHECK, NO APPEARANCES ARE NECESSARY ON 5/10/02 @ 1:30 PM. AND THE COURT WILL DISMISS THE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
